mainEntity.name: Timing: When to refresh content for Chicago AI overviews?
mainEntity.text: Timing: When to refresh content for Chicago AI overviews?

acceptedAnswer.text: Quarterly for practice pages, monthly for FAQs. AI favors content <90 days old citing recent Illinois rulings.

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago freshness signals relevance; update with new cases/2026 laws. Automate via CMS. Stale sites lose 50% citations. Tie to bar CLE for authenticity. Budget $500/mo writer. Opposing parties cite outdated info.

name: Content Refresh Schedule for Chicago
description: Quarterly for practice pages, monthly for FAQs. AI favors content <90 days old citing recent Illinois rulings.
